from __future__ import annotations

def linear_search_helper_called_from_nested_loops_negative():
    catalog = [{"id": 1, "price": 3}, {"id": 2, "price": 5}, {"id": 3, "price": 8}]
    cart = [[1, 3], [2, 1], [3, 2]]
    prices = {row["id"]: row["price"] for row in catalog}
    return sum(prices[item_id] * qty for item_id, qty in cart)
